nasb.text: But no one can enter the strong man’s house and plunder his property unless he first binds the strong man, and then he will plunder his house.

esv.text: But no one can enter a strong man’s house and plunder his goods, unless he first binds the strong man. Then indeed he may plunder his house.

cnv.text: 誰都不能進入壯漢的家，搶奪他的財物，除非先把壯漢捆綁起來，才可以搶劫他的家。

ccb.text: 没有人能进入壮汉家里抢夺他的财物，除非先把那壮汉捆绑起来，才有可能抢劫他的家。

csbs.text: “没有人能进入一个壮士的家抢夺他的东西，如果不先把那壮士捆住，就不能抢夺他的家。
